description_long: This object consists of two classic Chesterfield-style sofas, each featuring deep button-tufted upholstery and rolled arms. The sofas are upholstered in rich, dark leather, with one in a deep burgundy and the other in a chocolate brown. Both sofas have prominent, rounded armrests that are at the same height as the backrest, creating a continuous, elegant profile. The seat cushions are thick and appear to be attached, with a uniform, plush appearance. The legs are short, dark, and blocky, positioned at the corners for stability. The overall design exudes a sense of luxury and traditional craftsmanship, making these sofas suitable for upscale urban environments such as hotel lobbies, lounges, or stylish public waiting areas.
description: A pair of Chesterfield-style leather sofas with deep button-tufted backs, rolled arms, and rich burgundy and brown upholstery. The sofas have thick, attached seat cushions and short, blocky legs.
description_view_0: This view highlights the front and side profiles of both sofas, showcasing the rolled arms, tufted backs, and the contrast between the burgundy and brown upholstery.
description_view_1: The front view displays the full face of both sofas, emphasizing the deep button-tufting, thick seat cushions, and the color difference between the two pieces.
description_view_2: This angle shows the rear and side of the brown sofa and the front of the burgundy sofa, making the rolled arms and tufted details prominent.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the smooth, continuous back panels of both sofas and the rolled armrests, with the legs barely visible at the corners.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Each sofa has two large, attached seat cushions and a single continuous, deeply tufted back cushion. The cushions are uniform in size and integrated into the frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Both sofas feature high, rolled armrests that are level with the backrest, fully upholstered in leather, and decorated with button-tufting matching the backrest.
attribute_leg_design: Each sofa has four short, blocky legs positioned at the corners, likely made of dark wood or metal, with a simple, unobtrusive design.
attribute_backrest_type: The backrest is high, continuous, and curved, with deep button-tufting throughout, matching the armrest height and providing a plush, traditional look.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid-colored leather with a prominent button-tufted pattern on the backrest and arms, giving a quilted, luxurious texture.
